title: Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary
tagline: Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary situated on the northern boundary of Mandsaur and Neemuch districts in Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary situated on the northern boundary of Mandsaur and Neemuch districts in Madhya Pradesh, India. It is spread over an area of 368.62 km2 (142.32 sq mi) adjoining Rajasthan state in India. It was notified in 1974 and more area was added in 1983. The Chambal River passes through the sanctuary dividing it into two parts.

topPlaces.name: Navali, Mandsaur
topPlaces.description: Navali is a village in Bhanpura tahsil in Mandsaur district, Madhya Pradesh. Navali derives name from Latin word Navalis meaning "pertaining to ship".

topPlaces.name: Bhanpura
topPlaces.description: Bhanpura is a town and a nagar panchayat in Mandsaur district, located in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. Bhanpura was discovered by King Bhanu bhil.

items.note: Navali is a village in Bhanpura tahsil in Mandsaur district, Madhya Pradesh. Navali derives name from Latin word Navalis meaning "pertaining to ship".
Bhanpura is a town and a nagar panchayat in Mandsaur district, located in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India. Bhanpura was discovered by King Bhanu bhil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kota Airport (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Kota Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gandhi Sagar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Navali, Mandsaur, Bhanpura.
